headlines.headline: Yorvov Pharmaceuticals files for regulatory approval of new digital payments offering

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods CFO addresses investor concerns in open letter

sentiment.reasoning: A CFO addressing investor concerns suggests there are underlying issues, and the impact depends on whether the letter effectively alleviates those concerns.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
